en.name_en: Memorial Monument for the Repose of Castaways
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category. It is village-designated by Ogasawara Village, with designation dated July 22, 2010. It is located at Aza Okumura on Chichijima, Ogasawara Village.
